name: Black Olives with Tomatoes and Capers Over Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pitted black olives, medium, drained and broken up
1 tablespoon Balsamic or good quality red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or saucepan, heat the olive oil over moderate heat.
2. Add the garlic and onion, stirring until they sizzle.
3. Add the tomatoes, breaking them up with your hands.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (black olives, capers, vinegar, tomato paste, sugar, and oregano).
5. Simmer the sauce until it is thick but still slightly liquid, about 5 to 7 minutes.
6. Serve over cooked pasta.
